title: Hardened Shell
description: This creature cannot lose more than [blue]20[/blue] HP each turn.
smart_description: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] cannot lose more than [blue]20[/blue] HP each turn.
notes: Caps the damage the owner takes per turn to the power's Amount value (20). Tracks cumulative unblocked damage during a turn and resets at the start of each player turn. The displayed amount shows the remaining damage cap for the current turn.
